title: hieracium pilosum subsp. villosifolium
intro: Hieracium pilosum subsp. villosifolium, also known as the rough hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosum subsp. villosifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Hieracium pilosum subsp. villosifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
